The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\pc\\hardware-api\\serverless..serviceRawFile:
service: hardware-inventory-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: us-east-1
  stage: prod
  
  # Variables de entorno
  environment:
    TABLE_NAME: HardwareInventory
  
  # Permisos para acceder a DynamoDB
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:Query
          Resource: "arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:*:table/HardwareInventory"

functions:
  api:
    handler: handler.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: /
          method: ANY
          cors: true

# Excluir archivos innecesarios del deploy
package:
  exclude:
    - .git/**
    - .env
    - test.http
    - setup-dynamodb.js
    - check-tables.js
    - test-dynamodb.js
    - DOCUMENTACION_COMPLETA.md
    - GUIA_POSTMAN.md
    - swagger.js
    - server-with-swagger.js
